title: HTML Introduction: Getting Started with Web Development

meta.title: HTML Introduction – Learn the Basics of Web Development (2026)
meta.description: Learn what HTML is, how it works, and how to build your first web page in simple steps. Perfect for beginners.

content.value: HTML is the basic language used to create web pages. It helps you structure content like text, images, and links.
Every website you see on the internet is built using HTML.

value: **Easy to start** – You can learn it quickly.
**Works with CSS & JavaScript** – Together they build full websites.
**Good career skill** – Many jobs need HTML knowledge.

content.value: Basic Structure of an HTML Page

Hello World

This is my first HTML page
This is a simple HTML page. The browser reads this code and shows it as a webpage.

HTML uses tags like

and

to define content. When you open an HTML file in a browser, it reads these tags and displays them as a webpage.

Welcome to HTML

This is a simple paragraph.

Go to Google

value: **Keep your code clean** and easy to read.
**Use spacing and indentation** for better structure.

content.value: After HTML, learn CSS to style your website and JavaScript to make it interactive.
HTML is the first step in web development. Once you understand it, building websites becomes much easier.

faq.question: Is HTML a programming language?
faq.answer: No. HTML is a markup language used to structure content on a webpage.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything to use HTML?
faq.answer: No. You only need a browser and a text editor like VS Code.

faq.question: What should I learn after HTML?
faq.answer: Learn CSS for design and JavaScript for interactivity.

quiz.question: What does HTML stand for?
quiz.explanation: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language.

quiz.question: Which tag is used for a paragraph?
quiz.explanation: is used to create a paragraph.

quiz.question: Which tag is used to create a link?
quiz.explanation: <a> tag is used to create links.

quiz.question: Which tag is used for headings?
